title: ayenia dahomensis
intro: Ayenia dahomensis, also known as Dahomey ayenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to tropical Africa, traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties. The plant contains anthraquinones, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, providing health benefits such as wound healing, skin protection, and antimicrobial defense. Ayenia dahomensis can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal uses, and its herbal preparations have been employed to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and infections.
